underlying_goal: Understand why the production build was using the wrong HTML file (src/index.html instead of src/prerender.html) and diagnose why the header was lost in production
brief_summary: User wanted to understand why the ci-header-prerender was broken in production; Claude traced the issue through git history and build scripts to identify that the wrong HTML file (www/index.html instead of prerender.html) was being deployed to S3.
